title: cassinia leptocephala subsp. everettiae
intro: Cassinia leptocephala subsp. everettiae, also known as the Coastal Cassinia or Everitt's Cassinia, is a shrub native to Australia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been utilized in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Cassinia leptocephala subsp. everettiae include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Cassinia leptocephala subsp. everettiae is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with other medications.
